---
title: "euler_characteristic"
generated: true
description: "Euler characteristic $ chi = V - E + F$."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry.topology`](../nitrix-geometry-topology.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:euler_characteristic -->
```python
euler_characteristic(mesh: Mesh) -> int
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:euler_characteristic -->
Euler characteristic $\chi = V - E + F$.

Combines the vertex, edge, and face counts of the mesh into the classical
topological invariant.  A closed genus-0 surface (topological sphere) has
$\chi = 2$; a torus has $\chi = 0$; an open disk has
$\chi = 1$.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:euler_characteristic -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `mesh` | `Mesh` | — | — | Triangle mesh, with vertices, `(n_faces, 3)` faces, and the edge set induced by those faces. |

**Returns** `int`. The integer Euler characteristic $\chi$. Host-side; not differentiable.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
